name: Personal allowance taper zone
description: Single person earning £110,000 - personal allowance reduced in taper zone

sources.description: Verified with focus on personal allowance taper calculation (£100k tax trap)
sources.notes: Personal allowance taper validated: PA = max(0, £12,570 - 0.5 × (income - £100,000)). Effective marginal rate in taper zone (£100k-£125,140): 60% income tax + 2% NI = 62% combined. Verified using verify-gb-2026-tax-trap.py arithmetic script.

sources.description: Verified via official HMRC PAYE Tax Calculator and arithmetic validation using official 2026/27 rates
sources.notes: Income tax and National Insurance contributions verified against official HMRC calculator. NI calculation validated arithmetically using official rates: 8% on £12,570-£50,270, 2% above £50,270. Income tax validated using progressive brackets: 20%, 40%, 45% on taxable income after personal allowance deduction.
